data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for minimum purchase requirements.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the minimum purchase requirements, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for minimum purchase requirements but lacks the necessary details to assert their implementation, leading to an inconclusive status. No specific evidence was found that directly addresses the requirement for minimum purchase amounts.
gaps: No evidence of minimum purchase requirements.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the minimum purchase requirements.
